name: cannibal.live_world_day_smoke_persistence_reload_audit_mcw
description: No-fixture reload support audit for scenario 6: start the currently saved McWilliams dev-harness world after the cannibal day-smoke persistence save, then read saved dimension-data to confirm the active cannibal group/profile/target/member plus known_recent_marks signal state remains present. This is reload support, not independent product closure without the paired create/save run.

steps.label: post_reload_saved_cannibal_persistence_world_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the already-saved McWilliams dev-harness world reloads without fixture reinstall before saved-state metadata is audited
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after no-fixture reload, this run is only saved-file inspection and cannot be credited as reload support.

steps.label: audit_saved_bandit_live_world_after_no_fixture_reload
steps.abort_reason: after no-fixture reload, saved dimension-data bandit_live_world metadata did not contain the active cannibal smoke group/profile/target/member plus known_recent_marks signal state
steps.expected_visible_fact: after a fresh no-fixture startup of the saved world, saved dimension-data metadata still contains the cannibal_camp active stalk group with at least two active members, player target, and persisted known_recent_marks live_smoke signal state

evidence_contract.claim: paired with a green create/save run, a no-fixture reload still sees the persisted active cannibal group/profile/target/member plus known_recent_marks signal state in saved dimension data
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: reload support only / saved-state persistence support
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No reload-support credit if a fixture is reinstalled, startup/load is not green, or saved bandit_live_world metadata lacks the active cannibal state plus known_recent_marks live_smoke signal state. This does not claim intelligence_map.leads proof.
